objective: Implement fix for FORGE-BUG-007 to ensure the --count flag is respected when combined with --formal.
key_changes: Removed the conditional check 'if formal' in hello.py that was bypassing the loop.
Integrated formal greetings with the existing count-based iteration loop so they can repeat.
Verified correctness using multiple count values, both casual and formal formats, and with/without shouting.
